name: New Potatoes with Black Caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Wash and dry the potatoes.
3. Arrange the potatoes on a bed of rock salt in a shallow baking pan and bake for 30 to 35 minutes, until done.
4. Remove the potatoes from the oven and cut them into halves.
5. Scoop out the pulp with a melon-ball cutter, being careful to keep shells intact.
6. Mash the pulp slightly in a small bowl and keep warm.
7. Heat oil to 375°F in a large saucepan.
8. Drop the potato shells gently into the oil and deep fry until golden brown and crisp. Drain well on paper towels.
9. Fill the potato shells with mashed potatoes, top with a spoonful of sour cream, and add a teaspoon or more of caviar.
10. Serve on a thick salad plate atop hot rock salt.
